name: PureStrike Golf - Wake Forest
about: PureStrike Golf is an indoor golf training facility in Wake Forest, NC, combining advanced simulator technology with expert coaching to provide year-round practice opportunities. The venue features state-of-the-art Uneekor simulators with 24 real-time data points for every swing, accessible 24/7 to members. Membership plans are available for various skill levels and needs, from casual players to dedicated golfers looking to improve their game through structured training programs. The facility emphasizes data-driven instruction and personalized fitting services to enhance performance.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to high-tech simulators for year-round practice
Personalized coaching with real-time swing data analysis
Variety of membership options to suit different needs and budgets
Structured training programs that focus on measurable improvement
Professional club fitting and repair services

food_and_drink.notes: No bar or alcohol service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Provides 24 real-time data points per swing

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs as they are not provided by the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No food or alcohol service is mentioned, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are allowed. BYOB is not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete 18 holes is not specified on the website, but with simulator technology, typical rounds take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PureStrike offers junior lessons and has a Student Pass membership designed for junior golfers.
